title: Spicy Tomato & Pepper Sauce
summary: Make a big batch of this spicy tomato sauce and thank yourself later. It's perfect for spooning over eggs, stirring through pasta, or whatever you fancy.

method.description: Add the drained roasted peppers and chopped tomatoes to a blender, then blitz until mostly smooth.
Set a saucepan over a medium-low heat and add the olive oil. Gently cook the garlic for about 2 mins until fragrant but not coloured. Add the chilli flakes and cook for 30 seconds more.
Pour in the pepper and tomato mixture, add a big pinch of salt, and bring to a simmer. Let it bubble away for 15–20 mins until thickened to your liking. Taste and season with more salt, if needed.
Transfer the sauce to a clean, heatproof jar and seal tightly. Let it cool completely before storing.
If sealed properly, the sauce will keep at room temperature for up to 1 month. If not sealed, store in the fridge and use within 2 weeks.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
